_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: The two Nf1 heterozygous conditional mutant lines that showed spatial learning deficits, Nf1 and syn I+/− Nf1, also showed higher mIPSC frequencies (12.5 mM KCl)
details: Showed higher mIPSC frequencies under 12.5 mM KCl conditions, similar to global Nf1+/− mice
